title: Add Grafana Dashboard for Dapr Scheduler etcd Monitoring
body:
## Area
/area scheduler

## Description

Add a standardized Grafana dashboard to monitor the embedded etcd instance in the Dapr Scheduler.

### Problem
Operators lack visibility into etcd health during high-load scenarios, making it difficult to identify I/O bottlenecks, storage issues, or maintenance problems before they cause scheduler crashes.

### Solution
A focused dashboard visualizing key etcd metrics aligned with [Dapr's scheduler monitoring documentation](https://docs.dapr.io/concepts/dapr-services/scheduler/#monitoring-schedulers-etcd-metrics).

### Dashboard Panels
1. **Storage Capacity** – DB quota usage percentage and fragmentation ratio
2. **I/O Performance** – WAL fsync and backend commit latency (average)
3. **Maintenance Health** – Compaction frequency and defragmentation execution time
4. **Database Size** – Current physical and logical size


**Dashboard Location:**
https://github.com/dapr/dapr/tree/master/grafana

## Release Note
**ADD:** Grafana dashboard for monitoring Dapr Scheduler embedded etcd metrics, enabling proactive identification of storage and I/O issues.
